name: Roundup Stew
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Beef, cut into cubes the size of a thumb tip
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown meat in an 8-quart tall Dutch oven using bacon drippings.
2. Cover with water and slow simmer for approximately 1 hour.
3. Add carrots, salt, and pepper; cook for an additional 30 minutes.
4. Add potatoes and onions; simmer for another 45 minutes until the carrots and potatoes are tender.
5. Makes approximately 12 servings.
